name: Hindsight Memory Plugin for Claude Code
description: Installs the Hindsight long-term memory plugin (vectorize-io/hindsight :: hindsight-memory) into Claude Code and registers its hooks. Can be pointed at an external Hindsight server via hindsightApiUrl.

marketplace.description: Claude Code marketplace source to register (e.g. a GitHub repo, URL, or local path).

plugin.description: Plugin name to install from the marketplace. Use plugin@marketplace if multiple marketplaces expose the same name.

scope.description: Installation scope passed to `claude plugin install --scope`.

hindsightApiUrl.description: External Hindsight API URL. When set, ~/.hindsight/claude-code.json is written so the plugin connects to this server instead of starting a local hindsight-embed daemon.

hindsightApiToken.description: Bearer token for the external Hindsight API. Baked into ~/.hindsight/claude-code.json — leave empty and set HINDSIGHT_API_TOKEN at runtime if you would rather not commit the token to your devcontainer config.

bankId.description: Override the static memory bank ID used by the plugin. Empty keeps the plugin default (`claude_code`).

registerHooks.description: Run the plugin's setup_hooks.py to register the SessionStart / UserPromptSubmit / Stop / SessionEnd hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json after install. Disable to leave settings.json untouched.

username.description: Account that owns the installed plugin and config. `automatic` resolves to $_REMOTE_USER, then `vscode`, then root.
